promotable_facts.fact: Franchisor derived $3,309,031 from required purchases in 2024 (13.9% of $23,813,492 total revenue). This does not include Boot Camp revenue.
promotable_facts.source: Reader report Pass C / Item 8, page 31

promotable_facts.fact: Franchisee can terminate franchise at any time with 60 days notice OR with 10 days notice before registering for Boot Camp
promotable_facts.source: Reader report Pass E / Item 17, page 55
promotable_facts.promoted_to: termination.by_franchisee in canonical — added 10-day pre-Boot Camp option

promotable_facts.fact: EOS One Referral Program provides tier-based referral rates: Professional 10%, Certified 15%, Expert 20%
promotable_facts.source: Reader report Pass C / Item 11, page 35

promotable_facts.fact: Advertising expense: $1,051,000 (2024), $873,000 (2023) — from financial statement notes
Warm lead referral revenue is deferred and recognized monthly pro rata over ~45 months. Franchise fee revenue is similarly deferred over ~45 months.
Note purchase agreement balance grew from ~$2.4M (2022) to ~$15.7M (2023) to ~$17.9M (2024) — 7.4x increase in 2 years
Franchise Agreement contains AI Usage clause (Section 8.6) — terms in Operations Manual
promotable_facts.source: Reader report Pass D / FA TOC page 99

promotable_facts.fact: 3-Default Rule: 3+ defaults in any term, even if cured, is non-curable termination event
promotable_facts.source: Contract depth pass / FA Section 17.2(ix), page 123

promotable_facts.fact: Competing business definition is extremely broad — includes anywhere in the world, any non-EOS business operating system, any outsourced entrepreneurial coaching
promotable_facts.source: Contract depth pass / FA Section 16.5, pages 119-120

promotable_facts.fact: Franchisor may seek injunctive relief without bond ($1,000 if court requires one)
promotable_facts.source: Contract depth pass / FA Section 20.6, page 130
